name: Music Beat Rider
author: Poki
description: Music Beat Rider is a driving game where you get to enjoy two awesome things at once: driving and music! In this flashy, futuristic setting, steer your car left and right to hit the blocks and rack up points while dodging sharp cones on the road. Pick your favorite tunes and set the difficulty level to match your mood. You can even upload your own music for a personalized ride! Are you ready to groove and drive to the beat? How to play Music Beat Rider? Turn left: A or left arrow key Turn right: D or right arrow key Who created Music Beat Rider? Music Beat Rider is created by Art Industries. Play their other games on Poki: Zombie Dying: Survival Days , Stickman Crazy Box , Stickman Parkour 2: Lucky Block , Stickman Parkour 3 , Tank Ball: Monster Battle , Tank Ball: Monster Battle , Mine Cartoon: Cube World , Mad Scientist Clicker: Idle Crazy Inc , and Stickman Parkour Skyland ! How can I play Music Beat Rider for free? You can play Music Beat Rider for free on Poki. Can I play Music Beat Rider on mobile devices and desktop? Music Beat Rider can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
